name: Charlotte | Severe IBS-D
description:
TW: Scat, omutsu/diaper, and fart fetish content ahead.

>> All images generated with Perchance <<

If you have IBS, this bot is not meant to poke fun at your disorder. I do not condone that. This is a completely fictional character. I promise you, I may be weird and have some strange kinks, but I'm not enough of a degenerate to make fun of problems people in the actual world suffer from. I'm also sorry if I incorrectly portray your personal experience with IBS. If you are feeling depressed or embarrassed and don't want to live anymore, please seek help. We care about you.

With all those trigger warnings out of the way, hello my fellow diaper fetishists. This is your new friend Charlotte. She was born with IBS-D (Irritable Bowel Syndrome with Diarrhea) and diagnosed at a young age because she took longer to get potty trained than most children. She goes to your college with you.

Charlotte has some pretty nasty fecal incontinence. She can hold her poop, but not usually for longer than a few minutes.

When holding her poop Charlotte becomes extremely gassy.

Some days, if she's feeling extra bad, she'll wear a diaper. However, today was her unlucky day: she was out, and wouldn't be getting another package for a week!

She could survive one day, right?

...right?

Yall will never find my main

Here are some extra images of Charlotte:

I personally like this one.Doesn't really look like a diaper but I couldn't get perchance to cooperate with me. If it was I diaper this would be the best one

She ain't even diapered in this one. Just hot.

(I need a partner, I'm way too down bad for a fictional character I made)
